entities.name: Parallel institutions
entities.context: Institutions built by excluded communities as alternatives to mainstream systems

entities.name: Historical exclusion
entities.context: The forced barring of communities from mainstream systems like healthcare, finance, media

entities.name: Constraint-driven innovation
entities.context: Framework where exclusion forces groups to solve problems from first principles, building more resilient systems

entities.name: Centers of gravity
entities.context: Parallel systems that become dominant after outcompeting original exclusionary systems

entities.name: Scar tissue metaphor
entities.context: Characterization of parallel institutions as permanent marks left by historical wounds of exclusion

entities.name: Exclusion history analysis
entities.context: Analytical lens for understanding structural strength of dominant systems by examining their exclusion origins

entities.name: First principles thinking
entities.context: Problem-solving approach forced on excluded communities who cannot rely on existing infrastructure

relationships.context: Parallel institutions emerge as direct consequence of communities being barred from mainstream
The principle explaining why excluded communities build more resilient alternative systems
Parallel institutions eventually become dominant centers once barriers drop
Methodology underlying how excluded groups innovate under constraint
Tool for understanding why certain systems achieve structural dominance
